title: Industry Conference Platform

images.alt: Exhibitor dashboard with booth and pass management
Add-on services e-shop with cart and online payments
Admin analytics dashboard for registrations and applications

overview.description: Event registration and operations platform for a large-scale industry conference.
overview.details:
End-to-end Laravel application built for a major industry conference — covering public registration, exhibitor management, sponsorship, payments, and post-login experiences for attendees, exhibitors, sponsors, and internal teams.

The platform brings together self-service registration, company coordination workflows, exhibitor and sponsorship management, and role-based admin tooling with integrated payments, document exports, and email communications.

features: Attendee hub with conference content, travel forms, and organiser notifications
Company contact workflows to invite colleagues and track registration status
Central company directory with deduplication and search at registration time
On-site coordination workspace for assigned attendees and pass updates
Exhibitor and sponsorship management with delegate passes and booth workflows
Role-based admin panels for sales, operations, and general administration
